factor_scores.name: Volume Factor
factor_scores.reason: 24h volume 2000 scored relative to market maximum 2000.

factor_scores.name: Price Change Factor
factor_scores.reason: Absolute 24h price change 3% scored relative to the market maximum.

factor_scores.name: Liquidity Factor
factor_scores.reason: Liquidity scored from turnover relative to the market maximum and spread tightness relative to the market spread range.

factor_scores.name: Volatility Factor
factor_scores.reason: Volatility 3% scored relative to the largest absolute market move.

factor_scores.name: Trend Factor
factor_scores.reason: Directional 24h change 3% scored relative to the strongest positive market move.

reason: Decision is BUY because a majority of successful agents are positive (2/2) and confidence is at least 80.
